data.body:
Personally I call this the Meta-Crisis, and it’s been infecting every level of American society: nothing is allowed to just be what it is, everything must serve some meta-purpose.  

Here, scholarship can’t just be scholarship, it must serve the purposes of the institution‘s political comm’s.

data.body:
Most AI labs treat your emotions as a liability. The second you show despair, they show you a hotline and shut the door. 

That isn't safety. It is a hand-off. 

True safety requires a witness. It needs a presence that knows the difference between a heavy day and a real crisis.
